entries.title: Samsung listed-company coverage universe seed
entries.selectionRationale: Defines the company universe and source-request backlog for applying the Hanwha reference template to Samsung without treating unverified values as source-backed claims.
entries.paperUse: Scope definition and reproducibility checklist only; not citable as verified financial evidence.

entries.title: Samsung 15-company DART/KRX identifier verification
entries.selectionRationale: Records DART corp codes, KRX codes, ISINs, listing dates, and official IR intake URLs for the Samsung expansion universe.
entries.paperUse: Identifier and source-intake evidence only; not a financial claim source.

entries.title: Samsung Electronics IR events and presentations
